title: LB Agar (1 Liter)
author: Alba Balletbó

steps_raw.instruction: Add LB agar components in a 1 L autoclavable. LB agar components (1 L): %s %s
Add 1 L of distilled water into the bottle.
Place the bottle into the autoclave and sterilize.
